description_long: This sculpture depicts a robust, muscular male torso kneeling on a rectangular plinth, with both arms and the head partially missing. The anatomical details are pronounced, with well-defined pectoral, abdominal, and thigh muscles, suggesting a classical or heroic style. The surface is rough and matte, with visible chisel marks and an uneven texture, giving it a hand-carved, stone-like appearance. The back of the figure is equally detailed, showing the musculature of the shoulders and back, while the sides reveal the depth and volume of the form. The base is simple and rectangular, serving as a stable support for the figure. The overall coloration is a pale gray with subtle variations, mimicking weathered stone.
description: A rough-textured, pale gray sculpture of a kneeling, muscular male torso with missing arms and head, mounted on a rectangular base. The figure is highly detailed, evoking classical stone statuary.
description_view_0: Front view showing the detailed chest, abdomen, and thighs of the kneeling torso, with both arms and the head missing.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the torso, the curvature of the back, and the muscular definition along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the sculpted back muscles, shoulder blades, and the back of the thighs, with the base clearly visible.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizing the profile of the torso, the bent knees, and the rough surface texture.
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate installation environment.
